headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 10 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 10 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Billund (BLL/EKBI), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS). Across base airports: 4 critical, 11 high, 9 medium, 15 normal. Key bases needing attention include London Luton (LTN/EGGW), London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) and Chişinău (RMO/LUKK); plus 12 other bases. 9 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is mist, fog / freezing fog and very low visibility  — most notably around Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) and Craiova (CRA/LRCV). Network hotspots: Billund (BLL/EKBI), Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS), Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Trondheim Airport, Værnes (TRD/ENVA), Vienna (VIE/LOWW) and 5 others. Primary drivers: low‑visibility procedures, RVR limitations and approach minima limits. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Billund (BLL/EKBI), Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Trondheim Airport, Værnes (TRD/ENVA) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 10 airports right now. Base airports (focus): London Luton (LTN/EGGW) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 300 m, cloud base around 0 ft | London Gatwick (LGW/EGKK) — HIGH: mist; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 100 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 800 m | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — HIGH: freezing fog; visibility down to 350 m, cloud base around 100 ft; forecast below approach minima at times | Katowice Wojciech Korfanty (KTW/EPKT) — HIGH: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 300 m | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — CRIT: freezing fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 200 m, RVR down to 450 m, cloud base around 100 ft and 9 others. Worst affected now: Billund (BLL/EKBI) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Bucharest Băneasa Aurel Vlaicu (BBU/LRBS) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 50 m, RVR down to 325 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Trondheim Airport, Værnes (TRD/ENVA) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Vienna (VIE/LOWW) — CRIT: fog; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 200 m, cloud base around 100 ft (drivers: low-visibility procedures (reduced capacity), runway visual range (RVR) constraints, approach minima limits) | Cristiano Ronaldo (FNC/LPMA) — CRIT: strong gusts risk (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) and 4 others. Changed since last run: Billund (BLL/EKBI), Treviso Antonio Canova (TSF/LIPH), Trondheim Airport, Værnes (TRD/ENVA), Vienna (VIE/LOWW), Cristiano Ronaldo (FNC/LPMA), Craiova (CRA/LRCV), Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP), Almaty (ALA/UAAA), Solidarity Szczecin–Goleniów (SZZ/EPSC), London Luton (LTN/EGGW) and 2 others.
